assertions.title: Template file exists with correct content

steps.action: Run extension repo tests covering AGENTS template assertions
steps.expected: Template file is readable and contains heading `# APARA Wiki Conventions`
steps.observed: Test `repo > AGENTS template > includes all required sections` passed (this test reads `extension/templates/AGENTS.md` and asserts the heading and required sections).

outputSnippets: ✓ extension/test/repo.test.ts > repo > AGENTS template > includes all required sections

assertions.title: initRepo creates AGENTS.md in repo root

steps.action: Run initRepo unit tests in extension/test/repo.test.ts
steps.observed: Test `repo > initRepo > creates AGENTS.md from template` passed.

outputSnippets: ✓ extension/test/repo.test.ts > repo > initRepo > creates AGENTS.md from template

assertions.title: initRepo does not overwrite existing AGENTS.md

steps.expected: Existing custom AGENTS.md content remains unchanged after initRepo
steps.observed: Test `repo > initRepo > does not overwrite existing AGENTS.md` passed.

outputSnippets: ✓ extension/test/repo.test.ts > repo > initRepo > does not overwrite existing AGENTS.md

steps.action: Run AGENTS template section coverage test
steps.expected: Template contains all six required section headings
steps.observed: Test `repo > AGENTS template > includes all required sections` passed.

outputSnippets: ✓ extension/test/repo.test.ts > repo > AGENTS template > includes all required sections

assertions.title: Template page format documents WikiPage schema
